ksa_text: Knowledge of human-AI oversight architecture, including human-in-the-loop and human-on-the-loop design patterns, autonomy level frameworks, override and intervention mechanisms, and the governance structures required to maintain meaningful human control over AI system decisions.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-029 (AI and Machine Learning/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.507, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.507). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data lifecycle management: creation-to-disposal governance, retention policies, archival strategies, tiered storage management, and lifecycle compliance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.507, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.507)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Lifecycle Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
